title: Using Meta Tags Effectively Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential machine-readable metadata that browsers and search engines use to understand your pages.

questions.question: What is the primary role of the 'charset="UTF-8"' meta tag in an HTML document?
options: To make the page load faster.
To define the language used in the document's body.
To ensure all characters from every language are correctly displayed in the browser.
To encrypt the website's source code.

questions.question: Which meta tag is absolutely required to ensure a web page is correctly scaled and responsive on mobile devices?
The 'Open Graph' (og:) meta tags are primarily used to control what happens when a page is _______?
options: Shared on social media platforms like Facebook or WhatsApp.
Viewed on a very old browser.

questions.question: Which 'robots' meta tag value tells search engines to NOT index a specific page (i.e., hide it from search results)?
The 'theme-color' meta tag allows you to change the color of which browser element on mobile devices?
